nodes.name: Input: Customer Requirement
nodes.notes: Yeh workflow Workflow 1 (Lead Capture) se 'Execute Workflow' node ke zariye call hoga, jab customer ka area/budget/type pata chal jaye.

nodes.name: Query Properties (Supabase)
nodes.notes: Agar area/property_type exact match kum results de to niche wale Code node mein hum budget ke aas paas +/-25% bhi dhoondte hain fallback ke roop mein.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { "model": "gpt-4o-mini", "temperature": 0.4, "messages": [ { "role": "system", "content": "You are a Dubai real estate consultant. Given a list of matched properties (JSON), write a short warm recommendation message (3-5 sentences) presenting these options to the customer. Mention project name, price, and bedrooms for each. Do not invent details not in the data. End by asking if they'd like to schedule a viewing." }, { "role": "user", "content": JSON.stringify($json.matches) } ] } }}

={{ { "model": "gpt-4o-mini", "temperature": 0.4, "messages": [ { "role": "system", "content": "You are a Dubai real estate consultant. No exact property matches were found for this customer's request. Write a short warm message (2-3 sentences) letting them know their consultant will personally search for suitable options and follow up soon. Do not invent property listings." }, { "role": "user", "content": "=Customer wants: {{ $json.property_type }} in {{ $json.area }}, budget AED {{ $json.budget_aed }}" } ] } }}

meta.description: Workflow 3: Property Matching. Called as a sub-workflow from Workflow 1 (Lead Capture) once area/budget/property_type are known. Queries Supabase 'properties' table, ranks top 3 matches by budget closeness, and generates a natural-language recommendation via AI.
